Lord
Edwyle Stark
Titles

  • Warden of the North

Born 197–226 AC[1]
Died 229–262 AC[1]

Issue Rickard Stark[2]
Books
  • The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)
  • A Clash of Kings (mentioned)

Edwyle Stark was the Lord of Winterfell and the head of House Stark during the late reign of King Maekar I Targaryen and the reign of King Aegon V Targaryen. He was the only son of Lord Willam Stark and his second wife, Lady Melantha Blackwood.[2][3]

History[ ]

Edwyle married Marna Locke and had only one child with her, Rickard.[2] Edwyle was buried in the crypt of Winterfell. There is a statue of him placed with his tomb.[4] Edwyle was succeeded as Lord of Winterfell by his son, Rickard Stark.[2]
